climate.description: Tropical island with year-round warmth; breezy mornings, sunny middays, possible afternoon showers and rainbows.
challenges: Precipitation: Moderate afternoons in rainforest areas

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 69. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 66.

course_description.character: Three-day UCI stage race blending coastal flats, time trial, and rainforest mountains on China's tropical island paradise.
course_description.signature_challenge: Wuzhishan Rainforest queen stage with dual climbs through lush jungle to 787m summit finish.
suffering_zones: Queen Stage Climb: 15km two-part ascent to 729m in Wuzhishan Rainforest followed by 13.4km @4.1% to 787m finish.
Time Trial Loops: 19km out-and-back with double 5km loop in Yangpu, testing solo power on flat roads.
Coastal Sprint Stage: 108km flat coastal highway from Lingao to Danzhou with minor 557m gain, bunch sprint finish.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Hotels near Haikou Airport (north), Danzhou, and Wuzhishan; tropical resorts and beaches available.
logistics.transport: Three-day event across Lingao, Danzhou/Yangpu, and Wuzhishan; qualifiers close Oct 20; professional support from Tour of Hainan organizers.

history.origin_story: New addition to UCI Gran Fondo World Series as Hainan season finale; leverages Tour of Hainan expertise.

final_verdict.one_liner: Exotic tropical stage race blending coast, TT, and rainforest climbs for winter UCI qualifier fun.

citations.label: Gran Fondo Hainan wraps up the 2025 UCI Gran Fondo World Series
